sn35.95:1.1:
1
Atha kho āyasmā mālukyaputto yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami … pe … ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā mālukyaputto bhagavantaṁ etadavoca: "sādhu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena dhammaṁ desetu, yamahaṁ bhagavato dhammaṁ sutvā eko vūpakaṭṭho appamatto ātāpī pahitatto vihareyyan"ti.
sn35.95:1.2:
2
"Ettha dāni, mālukyaputta, kiṁ dahare bhikkhū vakkhāma. Yatra hi nāma tvaṁ, bhikkhu, jiṇṇo vuddho mahallako addhagato vayoanuppatto saṅkhittena ovādaṁ yācasī"ti.
sn35.95:1.3:
3
"Kiñcāpāhaṁ, bhante, jiṇṇo vuddho mahallako addhagato vayoanuppatto. Desetu me, bhante, bhagavā saṅkhittena dhammaṁ, desetu sugato saṅkhittena dhammaṁ, appeva nāmāhaṁ bhagavato bhāsitassa atthaṁ ājāneyyaṁ. Appeva nāmāhaṁ bhagavato bhāsitassa dāyādo assan"ti.
sn35.95:1.4:
4
"Taṁ kiṁ maññasi, mālukyaputta, ye te cakkhuviññeyyā rūpā adiṭṭhā adiṭṭhapubbā, na ca passasi, na ca te hoti passeyyanti? Atthi te tattha chando vā rāgo vā pemaṁ vā"ti?Pansala123
sn35.95:1.6:
5
"Ye te sotaviññeyyā saddā assutā assutapubbā, na ca suṇāsi, na ca te hoti suṇeyyanti? Atthi te tattha chando vā rāgo vā pemaṁ vā"ti? "No hetaṁ, bhante".
sn35.95:1.7:
6
"Ye te ghānaviññeyyā gandhā aghāyitā aghāyitapubbā, na ca ghāyasi, na ca te hoti ghāyeyyanti? Atthi te tattha chando vā rāgo vā pemaṁ vā"ti? "No hetaṁ, bhante".
sn35.95:2.1:
10
"Ettha ca te, mālukyaputta, diṭṭhasutamutaviññātabbesu dhammesu diṭṭhe diṭṭhamattaṁ bhavissati, sute sutamattaṁ bhavissati, mute mutamattaṁ bhavissati, viññāte viññātamattaṁ bhavissati. Yato kho te, mālukyaputta, diṭṭhasutamutaviññātabbesu dhammesu diṭṭhe diṭṭhamattaṁ bhavissati, sute sutamattaṁ bhavissati, mute mutamattaṁ bhavissati, viññāte viññātamattaṁ bhavissati;
sn35.95:2.2: tato tvaṁ, mālukyaputta, na tena. Yato tvaṁ, mālukyaputta, na tena; tato tvaṁ, mālukyaputta, na tattha. Yato tvaṁ, mālukyaputta, na tattha; tato tvaṁ, mālukyaputta, nevidha, na huraṁ, na ubhayamantarena. Esevanto dukkhassā"ti.
sn35.95:3.1:
11
"Imassa khvāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāmi:
sn35.95:4.1:
12
‘Rūpaṁ disvā sati muṭṭhā,
Piyaṁ nimittaṁ manasi karoto;
Sārattacitto vedeti,
Tañca ajjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:4.2:
13
Tassa vaḍḍhanti vedanā,
anekā rūpasambhavā;
Abhijjhā ca vihesā ca,
cittamassūpahaññati;
Evaṁ ācinato dukkhaṁ,
ārā nibbāna vuccati.
sn35.95:5.1:
14
Saddaṁ sutvā sati muṭṭhā,
Piyaṁ nimittaṁ manasi karoto;
Sārattacitto vedeti,
Tañca ajjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:6.1:
16
Gandhaṁ ghatvā sati muṭṭhā,
Piyaṁ nimittaṁ manasi karoto;
Sārattacitto vedeti,
Tañca ajjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:7.1:
18
Rasaṁ bhotvā sati muṭṭhā,
Piyaṁ nimittaṁ manasi karoto;
Sārattacitto vedeti,
Tañca ajjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:8.1:
20
Phassaṁ phussa sati muṭṭhā,
Piyaṁ nimittaṁ manasi karoto;
Sārattacitto vedeti,
Tañca ajjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:9.1:
22
Dhammaṁ ñatvā sati muṭṭhā,
Piyaṁ nimittaṁ manasi karoto;
Sārattacitto vedeti,
Tañca ajjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:10.1:
24
Na so rajjati rūpesu,
rūpaṁ disvā paṭissato;
Virattacitto vedeti,
tañca nājjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:10.2:
25
Yathāssa passato rūpaṁ,
sevato cāpi vedanāṁ;
Khīyati nopacīyati,
evaṁ so caratī sato;
Evaṁ apacinato dukkhaṁ,
santike nibbāna vuccati.
sn35.95:11.1:
26
Na so rajjati saddesu,
saddaṁ sutvā paṭissato;
Virattacitto vedeti,
tañca nājjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:12.1:
28
Na so rajjati gandhesu,
gandhaṁ ghatvā paṭissato;
Virattacitto vedeti,
tañca nājjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:13.1:
30
Na so rajjati rasesu,
rasaṁ bhotvā paṭissato;
Virattacitto vedeti,
tañca nājjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:14.1:
32
Na so rajjati phassesu,
phassaṁ phussa paṭissato;
Virattacitto vedeti,
tañca nājjhosa tiṭṭhati.
sn35.95:14.2:
33
Yathāssa phusato phassaṁ,
sevato cāpi vedanāṁ;
Khīyati nopacīyati,
evaṁ so caratī sato;
Evaṁ apacinato dukkhaṁ,
santike nibbāna vuccati.
sn35.95:15.1:
36
Imassa khvāhaṁ, bhante, bhagavatā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāmī"ti.
sn35.95:16.1: "Sādhu sādhu, mālukyaputta. Sādhu kho tvaṁ, mālukyaputta, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa vitthārena atthaṁ ājānāsi:
sn35.95:17.1:
41
Imassa kho, mālukyaputta, mayā saṅkhittena bhāsitassa evaṁ vitthārena attho daṭṭhabbo"ti.
sn35.95:17.2:
42
Atha kho āyasmā mālukyaputto bhagavato bhāsitaṁ abhinanditvā anumoditvā uṭṭhāyāsanā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā padakkhiṇaṁ katvā pakkāmi.
sn35.95:17.3: Atha kho āyasmā mālukyaputto eko vūpakaṭṭho appamatto ātāpī pahitatto vihāranto nacirasseva – yassatthāya kulaputtā sammadeva agārasmā anagāriyaṁ pabbajanti, tadanuttaraṁ – brahmacariyapariyosānaṁ diṭṭheva dhamme sayaṁ abhiññā sacchikatvā upasampajja vihāsi. "Khīṇā jāti, vusitaṁ brahmacariyaṁ, kataṁ karaṇīyaṁ, nāparaṁ itthattāyā"ti abbhaññāsi. Aññataro ca panāyasmā mālukyaputto arahataṁ ahosīti.
